c.d: Evaluates how truly random the shuffle feature is, avoiding repetition and predictable patterns.
c.s: User reviews, app descriptions, expert opinions

c.d: Assesses the app's ability to efficiently shuffle and play large playlists (1000+ tracks) without performance issues.
Indicates whether the app supports playing shuffled playlists offline, from locally stored music files.
Considers the ease of use, visual appeal, and customization options available for playlist management and shuffle control.
Evaluates the variety of audio formats supported by the app (e.g., MP3, FLAC, OGG, WAV).
